prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约344名，2023年升至约198名（近年最优），2024年回落至约316名，2025年进一步后移至约489名。近3年整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准位次 约489名，较2024年后移约173名，反映竞争加剧；该校在四川省招生计划逐年小幅增加：2022-2023年各23人，2024年24人，2025年26人，2026年（招生计划文 件）增至27人。2026年较2025年扩招1人，扩幅约3.8%，扩招幅度极小，对竞争缓解作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属北京大学，985/211/双一流，软科主榜北京 大学排名第2（2026年），医学学科实力全国顶尖，属最高层次院校；2026年声誉监测显示北京大学整体评价偏负面，但医学部作为独立招生代码，声誉独立性 强；抖音热度排名第3（高热），关注度极高；2025年北京大学在湖北提前批曾出现招生空档，但医学部未受影响；依托北京大学学科评估：口腔医学A、临床医 学A、基础医学A、药学A+、公共卫生与预防医学A，均为全国顶尖水平，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业社会热度持续高热，口腔医学、临床医学（ 八年制）等长学制专业尤其受追捧；四川省2026年高考总人数约53.5万人，较2025年（约46.3万）增长约15.5%，物理类考生估算约32.9万人，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；北京大学医学部位于北京，属跨省招生；该校在四川招生 计划占比较小（约26-27人），属典型的外省顶尖院校招生模式，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划仅微扩1人、四川 省考生规模大幅增长约15.5%以及医学类专业持续高热等因素，竞争压力较2025年进一步加大。在2025年基准位次489名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约515名，位次区间453-577名 。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 口腔医学（八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（五年制）
- 基础医学（八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（五年制）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 药学（六年制本硕连读）
- 预防医学（七年制本硕连读）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间453-577名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业为冲刺目标、三档专业为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（453名以内）可重点冲刺口腔医学或临床医学 八年制；位次在区间中段（约500名左右）建议以临床医学五年制或基础医学八年制为主；位次接近区间上限（577名左右）应以药学本硕连读和预防医学本硕连读为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2022 was approximately 344, rising to about 198 in 2023 (the best in recent years), falling back to around 316 in 2024, and further moving back to about 489 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, the overall trend shows a fluctuating backward movement. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 489, which is about 173 places behind 2024, reflecting intensified competition. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan Province has been gradually increasing year by year: 23 students each in 2022-2023, 24 in 2024, 26 in 2025, and 27 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). Compared to 2025, 2026 expands by 1 student, an increase of about 3.8%, which is minimal and has limited effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985/211/Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, Peking University ranks 2nd (2026). Its medical disciplines are top-tier nationally, belonging to the highest level of institutions. The 2026 reputation monitoring shows that Peking University's overall evaluation is somewhat negative, but the Health Science Center, as an independent admission code, has strong reputation independence. On Douyin, it ranks 3rd in popularity (high heat), with extremely high attention. In 2025, Peking University had an admission gap in the early batch in Hubei, but the Health Science Center was unaffected. Relying on Peking University's discipline evaluations: Stomatology A, Clinical Medicine A, Basic Medicine A, Pharmacy A+, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A, all at the national top level, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to have high social popularity, with long-cycle programs like Stomatology and Clinical Medicine (eight-year program) especially sought after. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Sichuan Province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% from 2025 (about 463,000). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 329,000, with a significant increase in candidate scale, leading to intensified competition. Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. Its enrollment plan in Sichuan accounts for a small proportion (about 26-27 students), typical of top-tier universities from other provinces, with regional preference having a neutral impact on application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the minimal expansion of only 1 student in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 15.5% in the number of candidates in Sichuan Province, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, the competitive pressure is further increased compared to 2025. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 489, the predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is about 515, with a ranking range of 453-577.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Stomatology (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
- Basic Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Six-Year Bachelor-Master Program)
- Preventive Medicine (Seven-Year Bachelor-Master Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 453-577, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 453), you can focus on sprinting for Stomatology or Clinical Medicine eight-year programs. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 500), it is recommended to mainly target Clinical Medicine five-year program or Basic Medicine eight-year program. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 577), you should choose Pharmacy bachelor-master program and Preventive Medicine bachelor-master program as stable options.
